subject: [HOLMES] Trying to migrate Holmes from Cloudify to Helm
commit_message:

Trying to complete the Helm charts of Holmes.

Patch Set 8: Code-Review-1

(11 comments)

kubernetes/dcaegen2 is not right place holder - this folder is specific to DCAE platform components charts. These charts should be submitted under separate toplevel directory -  oom/kubernetes/holmes (or as sub-component under oom/kubernetes/dcaegen2-services/components where bootstrapped service charts will be created for H release)
